channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: This Core Ultra 7 laptop deal for professionals with a 2K OLED 120Hz display is £427 off — Acer Swift Go 16 is just £722 with a code
item.description: Acer’s Swift Go pairs an Intel Core Ultra 7 255H processor with 16GB RAM and a 1TB SSD for demanding work, fast multitasking, and AI-powered applications.

item.title: Polymarket Bettors Allegedly Send Israeli Reporter Death Threats Demanding Changes to Article
item.description: That's not how being right works, guys.

item.title: Save Almost 20 Percent On Our Favorite Portable Bluetooth Speaker
item.description: The Tribit Stormbox Mini+ is as affordable as it is compact.

item.title: Energy hungry Big Tech turn to carbon credits to fuel data centers while remaining committed to net-zero emissions
item.description: AI is likely to blame for rising Big Tech emissions, and companies are mostly offsetting those with carbon credits.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 6, aspirateur robot DJI Romo P et méga promos Xiaomi : les 3 bons plans tech immanquables du lundi 16 mars 2026
item.description: Les Ventes Flash de Printemps touchent à leur fin, mais les réductions impressionnantes continuent ce lundi 16 mars 2026.

item.title: Judge rules that Krafton must rehire fired Subnautica director
item.description: A judge has ruled that publisher Krafton must reinstate Ted Gill as CEO of Unknown Worlds Entertainment, according to a report by Bloomberg. The company fired Gill and two other co-founders last year as part of a shakeup involving the long-anticipated sequel Subnautica 2. The Delaware judge said Krafton had violated the terms of its contract with Unknown Worlds when it fired the executives. "To remedy these breaches, Gill is reinstated as CEO of Unknown Worlds with full operational authority over the studio," wrote judge Lori W. Will. A Krafton spokesperson said in a statement that "we respect...

item.title: FCC Chairman Threatens to Revoke TV Licenses Over Iran Coverage
item.description: Here's the latest in the FCC's quest to keep American media on a tight leash.

item.title: Fini les problèmes visuels sur la PS5 Pro ? Sony livre une importante mise à jour
item.description: Après des débuts compliqués, le PSSR de la PS5 Pro tente de se refaire une santé. Sony a dévoilé une nouvelle version de sa technologie d’upscaling, peaufinée avec AMD, et promet enfin une image plus stable et plus précise.

item.title: Nvidia présente le DLSS 5 : l’IA générative au coeur du rendu de vos jeux vidéo
item.description: Nvidia a dévoilé par surprise l'une des promesses du DLSS 5 : l'application de l'IA générative au cœur du rendu graphique des jeux vidéo.

item.title: The MacBook Neo is ‘the most repairable MacBook’ in years, according to iFixit
item.description: Apple’s new MacBook Neo isn’t just the most affordable MacBook — it’s also the company's most repairable laptop in “about fourteen years."

item.title: Samsung ends Galaxy Z TriFold sales three months after launch
item.description: Samsung will reportedly end Galaxy Z TriFold sales in South Korea on March 17, three months after the device went on sale, according to South Korean newspaper Dong-A Ilbo. Samsung has not yet confirmed the report, but Engadget has reached out for comment. In the US, where the TriFold arrived in January, the phone will remain available until existing inventory runs out. A unit at retail (if you can find it) will run you almost $3,000. Samsung seemingly never intended the model for mass production. It sold the device in small batches through its website, with each selling out within minutes. Sam...

item.title: Chloé Zhao Is ‘Not Surprised’ Her ‘Buffy’ Reboot Got Staked at Hulu
item.description: The Oscar-winning filmmaker, a longtime fan of the Sarah Michelle Gellar series, explained that 'things happen for a reason.'

item.title: Did Amazon bribe Trump with the $40 million ‘Melania’ documentary? Congress is asking questions
item.description: A new letter gives Amazon until March 30 to explain its eyebrow-raising business decisions around the universally panned movie. Melania Trump’s self-titled documentary may have been more than a mediocre movie: It’s also the grounds for questioning if Amazon violated federal anti-bribery laws.

item.title: Boulanger lance aussi ses Ventes Flash : des offres Tech qui rivalisent avec celles d’Amazon
item.description: Boulanger cherche aussi à vous faire de belles économies sur vos achats Tech ce printemps 2026. Pour rivaliser avec Amazon, l’enseigne française lance ses Ventes Flash et fait baisser le prix de produits Tech. Découvrez les offres qui ont retenu notre attention dans notre article.

item.title: Here are the 13 best TV deals from Best Buy's Tech Fest Sale — save 50% on 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs
item.description: Best Buy's Tech Fest sale is live, and I've rounded up the 13 best TV deals I'd spend my money on, which include up to 50% off 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs.

item.title: The 2026 Oscar winners have been unveiled — here's where you can stream 7 of the biggest winners right now
item.description: One Battle After Another, Hamnet, and Sinners are some of the big 2026 Oscar winners, and you can stream them all right now.

item.title: Sony’s AI graphics upscaling for PS5 Pro games is getting a big update tonight
item.description: Sony's upgraded PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution (PSSR) technology is rolling out to several titles on the PS5 Pro, including Cyberpunk 2077, Final Fantasy VII Rebirth, Silent Hill 2, and more. Digital Foundry got a chance to test some of them and found that the "new upscaler delivers the kind of upgrade we were looking for […]

item.title: Golf is getting an AI upgrade — here’s what could change for fans watching The Open
item.description: A new partnership suggests data and artificial intelligence could soon play a bigger role in how golf is broadcast and experienced.

item.title: Encyclopedia Britannica is the latest giant to sue OpenAI
item.description: The group, which also runs the online version of the Merriam-Webster dictionary, is alleging that OpenAI misused its reference materials to train AI models. Encyclopedia Britannica is suing OpenAI for allegedly misusing its reference materials to train its artificial intelligence (AI) models.

item.title: Trump’s chief of staff Susie Wiles has breast cancer but will continue to work
item.description: Wiles is a longtime Trump ally who rose from his campaign co-chair to his closest adviser and counsel. White House chief of staff Susie Wiles has been diagnosed with early-stage breast cancer but plans to continue working through her treatment, retaining her place as one of President Donald Trump’s closest aides during a period of political turbulence....

item.title: How to watch Sporting vs. Bodo/Glimt online for free
item.description: How to watch the Champions League for free. Watch Sporting vs. Bodo/Glimt in the Champions League for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Apple acquires popular video editing software company MotionVFX
item.description: Apple's latest acquisition could be a hint towards improvements for Final Cut Pro. The tech giant acquired MotionVFX, as seen on the company's website and first reported by MacRumors, which is known for providing plugins, templates, visual effects and more to video editors. MotionVFX currently offers its software for a handful of video-editing apps, like DaVinci Resolve and Adobe Premiere, but is also listed as a trusted Apple partner and found in the Final Cut Pro ecosystem of third-party products. Apple hasn't revealed an acquisition price nor details of the deal. On its website announcement...

item.title: Amy Madigan's supporting actress win was my Oscars 2026 highlight — and I'm once again recommending Weapons to everyone I meet
item.description: Amy Madigan's Oscar win was a huge triumph for horror fans everywhere, as if I couldn't love Weapons any more than I already do.

item.title: How to watch Jensen Huang’s Nvidia GTC 2026 keynote — and what to expect
item.description: GTC is Nvidia's flagship annual event, where the chipmaker typically announces new products, partnerships, and its vision for the future of computing. Huang's keynote will focus on Nvidia's role in the future of computing and AI.

item.title: Another deep tech chip startup becomes a unicorn: Frore hits $1.64B
item.description: At Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's urging, Frore developed liquid-cooling tech for chips. That shift helped it raise $143 million.

item.title: Alerte aux perturbateurs endocriniens : les revendeurs européens commencent à retirer certains casques et écouteurs de la vente
item.description: En Europe, plusieurs enseignes majeures ont décidé de bannir certains casques audio suite à une étude qui montre la présence de perturbateurs endocriniens.

item.title: Samsung admits 'some variation' in Galaxy S26 Ultra's screen brightness due to Privacy Display — but it should be 'negligible'
item.description: Samsung admits to brightness issues with Galaxy S26 Ultra's Privacy Display

item.title: Washington Post’s Surveillance Pricing Under Fire From Dems Who Want to Ban the Practice
item.description: Can Jeff Bezos squeeze a little more money out of his dying newspaper?

item.title: These 16 major housing markets enter spring 2026 with enough supply to create homebuyer deals
item.description: Among the nation’s 50 largest metro area housing markets, these 16 now have above pre-pandemic 2019 inventory levels. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Fuse raises $25M to disrupt aging loan origination systems used by US credit unions
item.description: The startup also announced a $5 million "rescue fund" to help credit unions ditch legacy software for its AI-native platform.

item.title: Lego Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight's release date moves up a week
item.description: Lego Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight is a game that a whole bunch of people are looking forward to, and they might be pleased to learn Warner Bros. Games is making the wait a bit shorter. The publisher has moved up the game by a week from its previous release date of May 29, meaning it will land on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, Steam and Epic Games Store on May 22. A Nintendo Switch 2 version will be released later this year.Folks who buy the deluxe edition will still be able to jump in three days early. Everyone who pre-orders the game will get access to a The Dark Knight Returns Batsuit ...

item.title: The dictionary sues OpenAI
item.description: Encyclopedia Britannica and Merriam-Webster say that OpenAI violated the copyright of almost 100,000 articles by using them for LLM training.

item.title: Petit réduction sur ce smartphone gaming surpuissant avec écran AMOLED 1.5K 144 Hz et une puissance brute qui décoiffe
item.description: Ce smartphone, c'est le Redmagic 11 Pro avec une configuration poussée à l'extrême ainsi qu'une autonomie qui tient la route, qu'on retrouve à 797 euros au lieu de 839 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Quels sont les smartphones et montres compatibles eSIM ?
item.description: Disponible autant sur iPhone que sur les smartphones Android, l'eSIM, qui permet de se passer d'une carte SIM physique, est proposé maintenant chez tous les opérateurs (Free, Bouygues, Orange et SFR). Voici un résumé de tout ce qu'il y a à savoir sur l'eSIM.

item.title: Verrouillage, fin des ROMs, copie d’iOS : le sombre constat sur l’évolution d’Android
item.description: Alors, comme ça, Android serait devenu ennuyeux ? C'est le constat de nombreux observateurs, dont Damien Wilde de 9to5Google. Et il a raison, selon moi, la liberté totale laisse place à une normalisation qui rappelle étrangement le voisin d'en face : Apple.

item.title: Amy Madigan’s ‘Weapons’ Oscar Win Was a Big Win for Horror
item.description: Her Best Supporting Actress nod was part of horror's biggest Academy Awards haul, with the genre winning a record eight awards.

item.title: 'So good for the money, it shouldn't be allowed' — forget AirPods, these 5-star Cambridge earbuds at 34% off are my pick of Amazon's Spring Deal Days
item.description: I have them; I love them — and for just £78.99 they're an absolute no-brainer on the last day of Amazon's Spring Deal Days sale extravaganza.
